_comment_log_path: Where the daemon writes its log file. Leave default unless you know what you're doing.
_comment_pid_file: Path to the PID file used for liveness checks and graceful shutdown.
_comment_log_to_stderr: Also mirror log lines to stderr (recommended for docker logs).
_comment_daemonize: When true, the daemon forks into the background. Containers should leave this false so logs flow to docker logs.
_comment_wan_iface: Uplink interface facing the internet. MUST be set by the operator. Examples: eth0, wwan0.
_comment_lan_iface: Onboard / USB WiFi interface that will run hostapd as the LAN/AP. MUST be set by the operator.
_comment_lan_address: IP address the daemon assigns to the LAN interface (also the gateway / DHCP server).
_comment_dhcp: DHCP range handed out to WiFi clients. Lease time uses dhcpd syntax (e.g. 12h, 30m).
_comment_dns: Upstream DNS servers pushed to DHCP clients. Up to 3 entries.
_comment_wifi: AP credentials. Password must be 8+ ASCII chars for WPA2.
_comment_management_ports: TCP ports exposed on the LAN side only (e.g. future Web UI on 8080). Empty = none.
_comment_port_forwards: DNAT rules: array of {proto, ext_port, int_ip, int_port}. proto: 'tcp' (default) or 'udp'. Empty = none.
_comment_shaping: Bandwidth shaping in kbps. 0 disables shaping on that direction. Used by cake/fq_codel.
